output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's How to Get It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your deposit? Learn your rights and send a legal demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99. No signup needed.
content_outline: Introduction: Why landlords withhold deposits and what the law says
Tenant rights: What your landlord can and cannot deduct
State deadlines: How long a landlord legally has to return your deposit
What to do when your landlord won't return your deposit
How a security deposit dispute letter changes the game
The 60-second solution: No lawyer, no signup, no subscription
key_points: Landlords may only deduct for actual damage, not normal wear and tear
Most states require deposit returns within 14 to 45 days with an itemized list
A formal demand letter is often enough to force compliance before small claims court
You can create and send a legally formatted letter online in under a minute
output.cta: Stop waiting. Send your deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99—no signup, no subscription, just results.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are illegally withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting from their security deposits

social_hooks.hook: Can your landlord legally keep your entire deposit? Probably not.
social_hooks.script: Unless you punched holes in the wall or skipped rent, they can't keep your whole deposit for 'repairs.' Know your tenant rights, then send a demand letter that holds them accountable. Takes 60 seconds. Costs less than dinner.

social_hooks.keyword: is my landlord required to return my deposit
social_hooks.hook: Is your landlord actually required to return your deposit? Yes. Here's the law.
social_hooks.script: If you paid rent, didn't destroy the place, and gave proper notice, they owe you that money back by a legal deadline. Stop letting them ghost you. Demand it back in 60 seconds for $19.99.

social_hooks.hook: Tenant rights your landlord hopes you don't know
social_hooks.script: They can't deduct for normal wear. They can't miss the state deadline. And they definitely can't ignore a formal legal demand. Get yours written and sent in 60 seconds. No sign up. No hidden fees.

social_hooks.keyword: what can landlord deduct from security deposit
social_hooks.hook: Things your landlord CANNOT deduct from your security deposit
social_hooks.script: Scuffed floors after 2 years? Not deductible. Faded paint? Not deductible. Normal wear and tear is on them. If your landlord is charging you for this, fight back. Send a dispute letter in 60 seconds for $19.99.

social_hooks.script: Your landlord has 21 to 30 days by law. If they're past due, don't send another text. Send a legally formatted security deposit dispute letter in under 60 seconds. $19.99 flat. No signup required.
